title: Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 vs. Motorola Razr Ultra: Which is the better buy? - Engadget
summary: The Galaxy Z Flip 8 edges out the Razr Ultra, offering a newer, faster chip, seven years of updates, a redesigned AI-native cover screen and a $300 lower starting price.
